info.title: MMS API Documentation
info.description: API documentation for Mosque Management System (MMS)

post.description: Create a new parent account. An OTP verification email will be sent.

200.description: Account created successfully. OTP sent to email.

message.example: Account created. OTP sent to your email.

post.description: Verify the OTP code sent to the registered email address
Authenticate and receive an access token
Request password reset. If email exists, an OTP will be sent (for security, always returns success).

message.example: If email exists, OTP has been sent.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the halaqa to update

post.summary: Add students to halaqa: Required Role: **halaqa_supervisor**

delete.summary: Remove student from halaqa: Required Role: **halaqa_supervisor**

post.description: Send invitation email. Prevents duplicate active invitations for same email.
Accept invitation using token. Creates new account or attaches role to existing user.

name.description: Required only if creating new account

password.description: Required only if creating new account

password_confirmation.description: Required only if creating new account

message.example: Access denied. Your role does not allow this action.
